cos.author: Abbey
cos.text:
HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!

Corey and the team at COS Celebrations are absolute rockstars.  We just got married at The Lightner Museum in St Augustine and everything was amazing.  The Sax and Drummer were amazing touches that gave an awesome live music feel blended with the DJ set up.  Music was great and the dancing did not stop until the party came to an end.   Curated music for both cocktail hour and reception with an emphasis on detail and making our dreams come true.  If you have a vision just let them know and they will execute.

Highly recommend!!
cos.title: Must use!

cos.author: Lexi K
cos.text: I cannot recommend Corey from COS enough. He fully exceeded our expectations when we were supposed to have our wedding at the White Room back in October but it got postponed to November due to hurricane Milton. He was able to accommodate on short notice and fully helped make our postponed reception the best night ever. Between him playing the saxophone and playing music that catered to the crowd we couldn't get off the dance floor the whole night. The planning process was so seamless (even with my million little questions and last minute additions) with the help from Corey and Kyle. We added the Saxophone, violin, uplighting, and photo booth, don't skip out on the sax it is fully worth it to have a little bit of live music!!! Would recommend a million times over again 11/10, I can't thank them enough!!

cos.author: Danielle
cos.text:
Highly recommend the entire COS Celebrations team! 

Marc was absolutely fabulous and played such a huge role in making our wedding unforgettable. He got the party going, kept the energy up all night, and truly did everything right. From the music selection to reading the room, everything felt seamless and so well done.

We also had the photo booth, which was a huge hit with our guests and added such a fun element to the night. On top of that, Gabriel, the sax player during cocktail hour, completely elevated the atmosphere and made that part of the evening feel so special and memorable.

I also have to mention Kyle, who handled the setup and was incredibly responsive throughout the process. He made everything feel easy and stress-free.

We were so happy with the entire team and would highly recommend them for a wedding or any special event.
cos.title: The Perfect Wedding Entertainment Team

cos.author: Liz
cos.text:
Corey is THE BEST wedding DJ! If you're reading this and on the fence about booking Corey at COS Celebrations, stop reading and book him! Corey was so accommodating from the start. My husband and I live across the country and Corey flexed his schedule so we could zoom with him after west coast working hours. I always knew I wanted a drummer with a DJ at my wedding and Corey not only made that happen but also brought his sax! Communication was A+...timely and efficient. 

They have a very user-friendly app making it beyond easy to allocate song selections for each milestone moment throughout the day (including a 'do not play' list!). We had another zoom call with Corey a few weeks before the wedding where we talked through all the details...I am not lying when we were on the call for almost 2 hours where Corey answered any and all of our questions, offering unbiased advice when we asked for it. 

The audio the day of the wedding was perfect. We had an outdoor ceremony and Corey has grade A equipment and sound set up so everyone could hear us and the officiant perfectly. No static, no microphone feedback, nothing! We also had some specific music timing requests that Corey nailed. The dance portion of our wedding was truly epic. We had the drummer (which I HIGHLY recommend!) and Corey surprised us with his sax and it was show stopping! 

Corey helped make our wedding day run so smoothly. He was able to seamlessly guide our guests from location to location throughout the day. His emcee skills, calm demeanor, professional manner, and genuine care in making sure our day was perfect was something we'll never forget. We're almost a month out from our wedding day and guests will still tell us how much fun the dance floor was and what a great addition Corey was to our day! A big THANK YOU to Corey and COS Celebrations!
cos.title: The BEST wedding DJ!

cos.author: Chelsea
cos.text: We were lucky enough to book COS Celebrations and DJ Corey for our NYE wedding at the end of 2023.  Corey immediately came across as an organized and reliable professional that knows how to have fun! We were able to meet with Corey prior to our wedding (virtually as we live 2 time zones away) and he made the entire process fun and personalized to exactly what we wanted.  We had secured a wedding planner and day of coordinator, but honestly, I could see how working with Corey you may not even need that (but shout out to Kelsi Elizabeth Events for being the best planner!!).  He was extremely communicative during the days leading up to and during our wedding, always making sure we were taken care of and having a great time.  We opted to add the Saxaphone add on and it was INCREDIBLE.  Everyone loved it and really got the party pumped up for NYE.  We also booked his extra lighting, cold sparklers and photobooth - everything was so great and really completed the event.  I could not recommend Corey enough; he made our day so special and provided a top-notch service.  You need Corey/COS on your vendor team!!
cos.title: Best DJ in St. Augustine!!

cos.author: Katherine H
cos.text:
Words can’t describe how special Corey and his team made my husband’s and my wedding day at the Lightner Museum in St. Augustine. Being from Boston, this was a destination wedding, and Corey and Kyle put us at ease every step of the way. Any questions we had were answered right away and very thoughtfully, which truly gave us peace of mind.

Corey made every single moment so special for us—he even played the sax during our entrance song, and it got the crowd going wild! We will truly never forget these moments and can’t recommend COS Celebrations enough. We feel so lucky to have worked with them and will absolutely be using them again for future events.

Corey is hands down the best DJ we could have ever asked for. He read the room perfectly, kept the energy high all night, and had every single guest on the dance floor. The music, the vibes, the transitions—everything was flawless. If you want a DJ who truly elevates your wedding and creates an unforgettable party, Corey is your guy.

cos.author: Nicole B
cos.text: Corey is the best. It was an incredible night and the dance floor was never empty. He is genuine and a great person to work with. We trusted him wholeheartedly to put together a song list that matched with who we are as people. He also checked in with us many times over the course of the night to see how we were doing and even offered to grab us drinks from the bar. The saxophone during Cocktail Hour was exceptional and he was able to work in a few Billy Joel songs to keep the Long Islanders in attendance happy. He was organized and utilized an app that allowed us to easily fill in song requests, first dance songs, last dance songs, etc. so that the night was all about what we wanted. We also loved the personalization for the photobooth background that Kyle put together for us featuring the St. Augustine Lighthouse. You can't go wrong with COS Celebrations, they are top notch in terms of entertainment and professionalism.

cos.author: Kevin
cos.text:
Marc brought all the vibes!! I can’t even begin to imagine our special day without Marc and COS. From the beginning they were amazing. Easy to work with and always communicating professionally but yet relaxed. They put us first.

From the ceremony music to the grand entrance to the party on the dance floor, we were blessed to have Marc making the music happen. I highly recommend COS and Marc, what an incredible talent. Thank you Marc!!!
cos.title: Amelia Vibes with Marc!!

cos.author: Victoria C
cos.text:
COS was fantastic. We really appreciated being able to book our ceremony, cocktail hour and reception music, dance floor lighting, and extra audio equipment through one company.

Most importantly, Greg was EXCELLENT. From helping us with our music selection, playing the saxophone live, learning songs that were special to us, and managing the energy and flow of the wedding, Greg delivered 100% effort on each. All our guests were so impressed with him too - we got so many compliments, especially when he was on the dance floor with the guests ripping the sax! We highly recommend Greg for any event. He made our wedding so incredibly special!

cos.author: Megan P
cos.text: We are so happy we went with DJ Corey and COS Celebrations for our wedding! DJ Corey is absolutely incredible - from playing the music we selected to adding his own options that all of our guests loved - he made sure to keep everyone having the best time. Plus, his saxophone playing for some of the songs was a hit! From the first meeting, to the big day, COS Celebrations made sure everything was set and organized. We felt so comfortable working with them. We also hired Jeremy as a pianist for our wedding and he took the time to learn a song that I wanted to walk down the aisle to. They truly provide above and beyond service. I highly recommend COS Celebrations for your event! 10/10

cos.author: Christine
cos.text: Corey helped us recruit a drummer and harpist and he played the sax all night long. We had a blast and our guests did too. He also brought lighting and a co2 gun which made the party that much more fun. At the end of the night my husband hopped on the drum set and it felt like we were at a concert!!! He also brought Mics for the night and all the little things we never thought of. Everything was top notch. We took a lot of time to find the right person to bring music into our wedding and Corey was very responsive from the beginning and willing to listen to all our ideas to make our wedding day perfect. He outshone the 10+ other vendors we had spoken to in our search and we will use him again for events in the future. Highly recommended him for your wedding or event you won’t be disappointed!
cos.title: Corey gets the party started!

cos.author: Tyler
cos.text: COS celebrations and Corey did an absolutely perfect job for my wedding at Casa Marina in Jacksonville, FL. My wife and I met with him several times on zoom at no additional charge to discuss timeline and our desire for music selection and each time he was patient, professional, and truly helpful with adding inspiration or ideas for our party. He even set his zoom background to our venue so we could point and show him where things would be set up and done. The interface and app he and his team use to select our playlist was seamless to use, easy to edit, and allowed us to include others in our wedding party from a distance to select songs. He coordinated with all of our vendors and executed our timeline perfectly without us having to lift a finger, allowing us to truly enjoy our day. We had a wide range of ages at the wedding, and he used our playlist to make decisions in situ based on who was on the floor to keep the party moving all night. Also, he brought a saxophone and played it as part of the music during the dancing which was electric and made a lot of our guests very happy. We contracted live music through Corey for our welcome social the night before, and he handled booking that artist and delivering our vision. Corey truly wanted our night to be perfect and was invested in making sure the dance floor was always rocking. People came up to us, both old and young, and told us they had never seen a dance floor so full all night at a wedding. If you are looking for a DJ who is professional, artistic, easy to work with, and who will really care about making your day special, I can not recommend Corey and COS entertainment highly enough. He was the best I have ever seen at a wedding.
cos.title: Perfect, Best I have ever seen
